text:
drug products using the National Library of 
Medicine RxNorm Concept Unique Identifiers (RXCUIs). 
There can be several drug products submitted that are the same clinical formulation (same 
ingredients, strength, and dosage form) but different brand names. 
Each RXCUI corresponds to a unique brand name and clinical formulation. The CCW formulary drug ID 
is analogous to an RXCUI. 
SHORT NAME: FRMLRY_RX_ID 
LONG NAME: FRMLRY_RX_ID 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
PDE and CMS HPMS (derived)
